name: scutar
description: Scutar — backup, sync and restore platform for Kubernetes (Rust engine + Node.js operator)

scripts.start:server: npm run build:ui && npm run build -w @scutar/api && npm run start -w @scutar/api
scripts.dev:all: npm run build:operator && npm run build -w @scutar/api && concurrently -n operator,api,ui -c blue,green,magenta "npm run start:operator" "npm run start:api" "npm run dev:ui"
